[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02560:3ea97b8d36ad]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02561:956f38899057]]


[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02562:6203e55ca009]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02563:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
小角近似下，
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02564:5fddda0b1764]]
先把 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02565:b06e9eb4fb6b]] 点对应的最大光程差写成波长的倍数：
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02566:10aaa3e48b97]]
其中 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02567:d59fc13dc350]]。单缝明纹近似条件为
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02568:35d0024dcd38]]
所以 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02569:b06e9eb4fb6b]] 点是第 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02570:9a0a01239ac9]] 级明纹。此时[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02571:02e0f372bfa3]]，每个半波带对应光程差 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02572:177aba1e82bb]]，故单缝可分成 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02573:9dc64f47b907]] 个半波带。若缝宽增加一倍，观察点 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02574:b06e9eb4fb6b]] 不动，则 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02575:2182836b0dd3]] 不变，而
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02576:1fe2ee6c6acb]]
这满足单缝暗纹条件 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02577:9d3fdb5c7321]]，且 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02578:afe6acd7ffb2]]，所以 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02579:b06e9eb4fb6b]] 点变为第 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02580:9dc64f47b907]] 级暗纹。
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02581:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}


[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02582:f8bef20a677e]]

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02583:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
同一装置中，单缝宽度 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02584:5220707bcc6c]] 和透镜焦距 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02585:a867d5ad6508]] 不变，中央明纹宽度只随波长成正比：
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02586:84a8869f8261]] 
蓝紫光波长比钠黄光短，算出的中央明纹也更窄，这和衍射图样随波长缩小的判断一致。
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02587:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}

[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02588:81dd4f59364b]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02589:ff2eb9e78880]]{solution}
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02590:9c563fe2618b]] 
题目给的是两侧第三级暗纹之间的全距离，故单侧 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02591:ee84b2ac2bf6]]，于是
 [[PROTECTED:F00001-P02592:668d410103e7]]
[[PROTECTED:F00001-P02593:06b3847e1b6f]]{solution}
